title: Configure Weather-Bot Trigger and Open-Meteo Ensemble Integration
job:
Job: Configurar trigger do weather-bot e adicionar ensemble

### 1. ADICIONAR TRIGGER NO TRIGGERS.JSON
Adicionar em `config/TRIGGERS.json`:
```json
{
  "name": "weather-bot",
  "type": "telegram",
  "bot_token_env": "WEATHER_BOT_TOKEN",
  "handler": "triggers/weather-bot.js",
  "enabled": true
}
```

### 2. ADICIONAR ENSEMBLE DO OPEN-METEO
Modificar todas as chamadas da API Open-Meteo em:
- `skills/weather-bot/weather.sh`
- `skills/weather-bot/send-daily.sh`
- Qualquer outro script que use Open-Meteo

Adicionar `&models=best_match` nas URLs:
- Antes: `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=-23.55&longitude=-46.70&hourly=temperature_2m,precipitation_probability,precipitation&timezone=America/Sao_Paulo`
- Depois: `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=-23.55&longitude=-46.70&hourly=temperature_2m,precipitation_probability,precipitation&models=best_match&timezone=America/Sao_Paulo`

### 3. VERIFICAR SECRETS
Garantir que as variáveis de ambiente estão configuradas:
- WEATHER_BOT_TOKEN=8748218290:AAH0ht_meMiVa2U4zSDVOtFrZkyvOt_85x0
- WEATHER_BOT_ADMIN_ID=5121600266

### 4. REGISTRAR WEBHOOK
Configurar webhook do Telegram:
```bash
curl -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8748218290:AAH0ht_meMiVa2U4zSDVOtFrZkyvOt_85x0/setWebhook" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"url": "https://jarbas.polvify.app/api/telegram/webhook/weather-bot"}'
```

### 5. TESTAR
- Enviar mensagem para @Perninhasclimabot
- Verificar se o menu aparece
- Testar cada opção do menu
